shah_alam_2021.name_en: Shah Alam / Taman Sri Muda, December 2021
shah_alam_2021.name_bm: Shah Alam / Taman Sri Muda, Disember 2021

en: Public awareness and inter-agency coordination were named as systemic gaps in the MDPI 2025 post-mortem.
Residents waited 16+ hours on roofs before rescue because no single agency had end-to-end visibility.
Four rescue agencies (BOMBA, NADMA, APM, MMEA) each ran parallel WhatsApp groups; handoffs failed.
bm: Kesedaran awam dan penyelarasan antara agensi dikenal pasti sebagai jurang sistemik dalam post-mortem MDPI 2025.
Penduduk menunggu lebih 16 jam di atas bumbung sebelum diselamatkan kerana tiada agensi mempunyai visibiliti hujung-ke-hujung.
Empat agensi penyelamat menjalankan kumpulan WhatsApp selari; pertukaran maklumat gagal.

en: Worst floods since 2014 (per Deputy PM Ahmad Zahid).
100+ Orang Asli families were cut off in Johor — helicopter food drops only for 4 days.
bm: Banjir paling teruk sejak 2014 (menurut TPM Ahmad Zahid).
Lebih 100 keluarga Orang Asli terputus hubungan di Johor — hanya jatuhan makanan helikopter selama 4 hari.
